SystemState.title: System State
SystemState.description: Global state for the polling sequence

currentPollNumber.description: Sequence number of the current poll (1-10)

isActive.description: Whether the current poll is visible to users

Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: A vote cast by a user on a specific poll

/system/state.description: The current globally active poll state

/votes/{voteId}.description: Individual votes tracked by poll number and user
